case_title: PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY A CORPORATION VS. DAVID NIBARGER et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NIBARGER, DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO X AND EACH OF THEM, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-08-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-12-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-23-2004
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NIBARGER, DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY A CORPORATION SERVED MAY-23-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NIBARGER, DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT NIBARGER, DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION DAVID J. COOK FILED RE: SUMMARY OF THE CASE AND COMPUTATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY A CORPORATION
DECLARATION DAVID J. COOK FILED RE: WAIVER OF FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY A CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO X AND EACH OF THEM, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIBARGER, DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL $129,191.29 PRINCIPAL, $2,477.30 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $131,668.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-08-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
